# `nise generate config`

- **Usage**: `nise generate config [FLAGS] [PATH]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/generate/config.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/generate/config.rs)

Generate a nise.toml file

## Arguments

### `[PATH]`

Path to the config file to create

## Flags

### `-g --global`

Generate the global config file (~/.config/mise/config.toml)

### `-n --dry-run`

Show what would be generated without writing to file

### `-t --tool-versions <TOOL_VERSIONS>`

Path to a .tool-versions file to import tools from

Examples:

```
$ nise generate config             # generate nise.toml interactively
$ nise generate config .nise.toml  # generate a specific file
$ nise generate config -g          # generate the global config file
$ nise generate config -y          # skip interactive editor
$ nise generate config -n          # preview without writing
```
